summary: Good matrix capture of a rare 1966 show packed with early gems like Me & My Uncle, The Same Thing and Cold Rain & Snow, though the tape runs slightly slow and needs pitch correction.
review: The recording is a matrix mix that preserves an extraordinary collection of 1966 rarities—Me & My Uncle, Early Morning Rain, Down So Long and more—making it a must‑listen for archivists. Audio quality is solid overall but the playback is about +1 % off pitch, runs slow and has the stereo channels reversed, requiring a quick fix. The performance itself is praised as one of the year’s best despite missing the first set.

ai_rating.rationale: Review gives 4 ★ and highlights many standout songs, indicating a strong show; recording is good but noted pitch/channel issues, lowering the technical score slightly.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Matrix (soundboard + audience) mix with clear instrument separation. Playback runs ~+1 % fast and is a bit slow; channels are swapped and need correction for true concert pitch.

standout_songs: I Just Want to Make Love to You
show_quality.setlist_flow: Second and third sets are a treasure trove of rarities; the first set is missing, but the remaining material flows through obscure covers and early originals with high historical interest.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Suffers from a cold during the show and asks Phil to take lead vocals.
